case_title: REPLOGLE, DAVID vs. CHILDRESS, PETER J et al

docket_entries.description: JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL COVER SHEET FIFLED BY PTLF.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-21-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE ON PLTF'S ATTY FOR FAILURE TO FILE POS OR SC STATEMENT. HEARING SET FOR MAY-21-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-21-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAY-21-1997, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OSC ON PLTF'S ATTY, TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED OR IMPOSE SANCTION FOR NOT FILING POS., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-05-1997 CONTINUED FROM MAY-21-1997 TO JUL-16-1997 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-16-1997, DISMISSAL FOR FAILURES TO APPEAR AT OSC HEARINGS, FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES AND ORDERS, FAILURE TO PAY SANCTIONS IMPOSED.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF REPLOGLE, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT CHILDRESS, PETER J MURPHY, CHRISTINE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-21-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-18-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-01-1997
